title: 21 Upcoming Dividend Increases Including One Dividend King
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 9.6% and a median increase of 6.25%. I've tracked 118 increases in 2022. There are twenty-one increases for next week, up from eighteen last week.

title: Dividend Increases: January 29-February 4, 2022
text: In this article series, we provide a weekly summary of dividend changes. A summary table presents relevant data and key statistics of dividend increases.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) CEO Joseph Nolan on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Eversource Energy (ES) CEO Joseph Nolan on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Eversource's (ES) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Eversource Energy's (ES) fourth-quarter earnings are lower than expected. ES increases five-year capital expenditure plan by $1.1 billion to $18.1 billion, with an objective of fortifying its infrastructure.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) Lags Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Eversource (ES) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.15% and 0.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Utility Stocks' Q4 Earnings Due on Feb 17: ES, IDA, ED & LNT
text: Let's focus on utility stocks ES, ED IDA and LNT that are scheduled to release fourth-quarter earnings on Feb 17.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Eversource's (ES) fourth-quarter earnings are likely to have gained from contribution from transmission and distribution businesses, offset by lower support from the water distribution business.

title: 4 Utility Stocks Set to Surpass Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Utilities DTE, D, ES, and AEE are likely to beat four-quarter earnings estimates, courtesy of stable demand for their services and systematic investments to provide quality services to customers.

title: Eversource Energy to Discuss Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Results
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource Energy will webcast a call with financial analysts on February 17, 2022, to discuss 2021 financial performance and the outlook for 2022.
